disclosures.disclaimer: Structured dataset metadata used for pre- and post-training IBM Granite 4 base and instruct models is being released as part of IBM's effort to provide the community with highly transparent open source model development. In this spirit, we are releasing metadata related to datasets directly ingested during training and metadata for datasets used to source seed data for IBM's synthetic data pipelines. This structured disclosure is provided in machine readable .JSON format as a governance artifact to inform risk-based controls for downstream model use. For more information on IBM's compliance with AI laws and regulations, go to: https://www.ibm.com/granite and https://www.ibm.com/granite/docs/resources/responsible-use-guide.pdf.

model.name: Granite-4.0-h-tiny
model.intended_use: Designed for low latency and local applications, particularly where the task has long prefill or other scenarios where a MoE model is desired

datasets.name: GneissWeb
datasets.description: GneissWeb is a large-scale dataset for LLM pretraining, consisting of around 10 trillion tokens. (Gohari, et al., 2025)

datasets.name: Code Pile
datasets.description: Our code pile is sourced from a combination of publicly available datasets like Github Code Clean, StarCoderdata, and additional public code repositiories and issues from Github. We filter raw data to retain a list of 116 programming languages and only keep files with permissive licenses for model training.

datasets.name: LOC-PD-Books
datasets.description: This dataset contains more than 140,000 English books (~ 8 billion words) digitised by the Library of Congress (LoC) that are in the public domain in the United States.

datasets.name: Cosmopedia V2
datasets.description: An enhanced version of Cosmopedia, the largest synthetic dataset for pre-training, consisting of over 39 million textbooks, blog posts, and stories generated by Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1

datasets.name: DM Math
datasets.description: DeepMind Math dataset with generated questions from various topics like algebra, calculus, geometry, etc. and converted to jsonl format.

datasets.name: Stack-Exchange - Txt360
datasets.description: One of the largest publicly available repositories for question-answer pairs, this dataset is a network of question-and-answer websites on various subjects including programming, science, mathematics, and more.

datasets.name: open-web-math
datasets.description: Contains the majority of the high-quality, mathematical text from the internet.

datasets.name: Algebraic-Stack
datasets.description: A new dataset of mathematical code composed of 11B tokens that includes numerical computing, computer algebra, and formal mathematics. This dataset is part of the Proof-Pile-2 collection (Paster et al., 2023).

datasets.name: opc-fineweb-math-corpus
datasets.description: This math-related data from Fineweb was specifically used in OpenCoder pre-training. We employ fastText in three iterative rounds to recall a final dataset of 55B code and math-related data.

datasets.name: FineMath
datasets.description: FineMath consists of 34B tokens (FineMath-3+) and 54B tokens (FineMath-3+ with InfiMM-WebMath-3+) of mathematical educational content filtered from CommonCrawl.

datasets.name: MegaMath
datasets.description: MegaMath is an open math pretraining dataset curated from diverse, math-focused sources, with over 300B tokens.

datasets.name: Nemotron-MIND
datasets.description: A compilation of pretraining data that supports improvements of math reasoning capabilities of the Nemotron5 series of models. Nemotron-MIND contains over 138 billion tokens of structured mathematical dialogues generated by Nemotron4-340B-Instruct.

datasets.name: MADLAD-400
datasets.description: MADLAD-400 (Multilingual Audited Dataset: Low-resource And Document-level) is a document-level multilingual dataset based on Common Crawl, covering 419 languages in total. This uses all snapshots of CommonCrawl available as of August 1, 2022. The primary advantage of this dataset over similar datasets is that it is more multilingual (419 languages), it is audited and more highly filtered, and it is document-level.

datasets.name: CulturaX
datasets.description: A multilingual dataset with 6.3 trillion tokens in 167 languages, tailored for LLM development.
datasets.languages: bn, gu, hi, kn, ml, mr, or, pa, ta, te

datasets.name: Fineweb2-edu-multilingual
datasets.description: Internal multilingual dataset, based upon Fineweb2 dataset, filtered for highest quality documents.
datasets.languages: en, ja, de, fr, it, ko, ar, zh

datasets.name: Open-Platypus Translated
datasets.description: Translated Open Platypus dataset for improved multilingual support.

datasets.name: EvolKit-20 Translated
datasets.description: Translated Evolkit-20k dataset for improved multilingual support.

datasets.name: HelpSteer2 Translated
datasets.description: Translated Helpsteeer2 dataset for improved multilingual support.

datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: DOLMino dataset mix - Flan partition
datasets.description: Flan partition of the allenai dolmino mix 1124 dataset.

datasets.name: Hermes Function-Calling V1
datasets.description: A structured output dataset of multi-turn function-calling conversations designed to train models to interpret natural language and generate correct function invocations with JSON-style responses. It includes diverse scenarios where assistants must decide which functions to call and format their arguments properly, making it useful for improving real dialogue-level tool-calling behavior.

datasets.name: CoT-Python Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic Python code reasoning SFT dataset with Chain of Thought reasoning, which is aimed to improve model's reasoning performance for Input-Ouput prediction task for Python code.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Temporal Reasoning Synthetic
datasets.description: A dataset of question-answer pairs designed to improve the temporal reasoning capabilities of large language models. The dataset specifically targets known weaknesses in understanding time-related concepts, such as historical era transitions (BC/AD), cyclical time calculations (day-of-week), and other complex temporal arithmetic problems such as duration and schedule. The data includes a step-by-step "chain of thought" reasoning for each problem, leading to a final answer.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic MagPie Logical Reasoning
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset of puzzles and solutions created by folllowing MagPie self generation technique
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: SAP Knowledge Base
datasets.description: Crawled data from sap.com knowledge support websites

datasets.name: Nemotron-CC
datasets.description: A 6.3T token dataset based on Common Crawl, consisting of 4.4T globally deduplicated original tokens and 1.9T synthetically generated tokens.

datasets.name: Concert Workflow Data
datasets.description: Data generated by, processed through, or used within the IBM Concert Workflows platform
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Concert Actions Data
datasets.description: Structured information associated with actions generated, recommended, or executed within the IBM Concert platform.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OPA Data_Public
datasets.description: Structured JSON data that provides external context or facts used by Open Policy Agent (OPA) policies.

datasets.name: OPA Data_Docs
datasets.description: Core concepts in OPA's policy language (Rego).

datasets.name: Spider 1.0
datasets.description: Large-scale complex and cross-domain semantic parsing and text-to-SQL dataset.

datasets.name: Kubectl data
datasets.description: Kubectl data relevant to SRE Agent.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenMathReasoning
datasets.description: Large-scale math reasoning dataset for training large language models (LLMs)

datasets.name: NuminaMath-CoT
datasets.description: Approximately 860k math problems, where each solution is formatted in a Chain of Thought (CoT) manner.

datasets.name: data ablation_full59K
datasets.description: Approximately 59k high-quality mathematical problems and solutions designed for training reasoning-based AI models. Features detailed thinking trajectories and chain-of-thought (CoT) responses sourced from various competitive math benchmarks.

datasets.name: Llama-Nemotron Post Training
datasets.description: Compilation of SFT and RL data that supports improvements of math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following capabilities of the original Llama instruct model, in support of NVIDIA’s release of Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1, Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 and Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Nano-8B-v1.

datasets.name: NuminaMath-1.5
datasets.description: Second iteration of NuminaMath dataset, bringing high quality post-training data for approximately 900k competition-level math problems. Each solution is formatted in a Chain of Thought (CoT) manner.

datasets.name: DeepScaleR Preview Dataset
datasets.description: Approximately 40,000 unique mathematics problem-answer pairs compiled from: AIME, AMC, Omni-MATH dataset, and Still dataset.

datasets.name: HARDMath
datasets.description: A dataset of challenging, graduate-level problems in applied mathematics that can be used for language model evaluation. Unlike other popular mathematical datasets, HARDMath contains problems that require a combination of advanced problem-solving skills, approximation methods, and mathematical intuition. The dataset contains a large test set of 1,050 problems and a mini test set of 437 problems, divided across seven different problem types.

datasets.name: Ncert Dataset
datasets.description: A collection of educational content derived from NCERT textbooks for students in standards 6 to 12. NCERT books are textbooks published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT), an Indian organization focused on improving school education.

datasets.name: open-thoughts/OpenThoughts3-1.2M
datasets.description: The third iteration the our line of OpenThoughts datasets, building on previous OpenThoughts-114k and OpenThoughts2-1M. The dataset consists of 850,000 math questions, 250,000 code questions, and 100,000 science questions.

datasets.name: open-r1/codeforces - questions only: HuggingFace Download
datasets.description: CodeForces is one of the most popular websites among competitive programmers, hosting regular contests where participants must solve challenging algorithmic optimization problems. The challenging nature of these problems makes them an interesting dataset to improve and test models’ code reasoning capabilities. This dataset includes more than 10k unique problems covering the very first contests all the way to 2025. Additionally, it includes generated and extensively validated custom checker code for problems with multiple solutions, and generated additional challenging test cases.

datasets.name: openCodeReasoning
datasets.description: Open Code Reasoning is the largest reasoning-based synthetic dataset to date for coding, comprising of 736,712 samples in Python across 28,904 unique competitive programming questions.

datasets.name: /OpenCoder-LLM/opc-sft-stage2/viewer/educational_instruct
datasets.description: Contains generated (instruction, code, test case) triples, validated through a Python compiler. Notably, the inclusion of test cases provides a valuable signal for code RL.

datasets.name: OpenCoder-LLM/opc-sft-stage2/viewer/package_instruct
datasets.description: Used extracted common interface documentation from pydoc as a seed to generate Python package-related questions.

datasets.name: Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset
datasets.description: A compilation of SFT and RL data that supports improvements of math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following capabilities of the original Llama instruct model, in support of NVIDIA’s release of Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1, Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 and Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Nano-8B-v1.

datasets.name: Multi-turn sequential slot filling and tool usage
datasets.description: A multi-step dataset derived from the Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) data that focuses on sequential slot filling and tool usage across multiple turns. It requires models to extract slots from user input, call the appropriate tools in order, and use tool responses to complete downstream actions correctly.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: GovReport-QS
datasets.description: Multi turn conversations extracted from the GovReport datasets, specifically forcusing on the conversations on long documents.

datasets.name: hotpot_qa
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations extracted from the hotpotQA, specifically forcusing on the conversations on long documents and requiring reasoning.

datasets.name: NarrativeQA
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations extracted from the NarrativeQA, specifically focusing on the conversations on long documents.

datasets.name: TechQA
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations sampled from the TechQA, specifically focusing on the conversations on techincal documents.

datasets.name: FinQA
datasets.description: FinQA is a large-scale dataset with 2.8k financial reports for 8k Q&A pairs to study numerical reasoning with structured and unstructured evidence.

datasets.name: Indic Vault
datasets.description: Instruction-tuned dataset that contains question-answer pairs in contemporary, everyday Indian languages

datasets.name: leetcode-solutions-en-2k
datasets.description: Dataset contains English descriptions and solutions for approximately 2,000 LeetCode problems.

datasets.name: DCLM-baseline
datasets.description: A 4T token / 3B document pretraining dataset that achieves strong performance on language model benchmarks.

datasets.name: Synthetic syn-sql-2.5
datasets.description: IBM generated synthetic dataset mimics the manner in which syn-sql-2.5 dataset is created, but using gpt-oss-120b.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic MagPie Science QA
datasets.description: Dataset generated using MagPie self data generation technique. Using Phi-4 as a teacher model, the model generates both questions and answers to science questions.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic MagPie API
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset of questions and answers relating to API calling and its specifications, created by folllowing MagPie self generation technique
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: APIGen function calling Synthetic
datasets.description: A function calling dataset using a modification of the APIgen pipeline where only gpt-oss-120b is used.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Open Policy Agent (OPA) policies Dataset
datasets.description: A synthetic dataset of OPA policies.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: NL2Opt Pyomo
datasets.description: Synthetically generated dataset containing natural language descriptions of mixed-integer linear optimization problems and formatted demonstrations showcasing how to solve the (synthetic) optimization problems using Pyomo.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: NL2GraphQL
datasets.description: A subset of relational tables from the WikiSQL and CoSQL datasets with a generated GraphQL schema
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: NL2OSLC
datasets.description: Training dataset for natural language questions to Maximo OSLC APIs translation.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: NL2Kubectl
datasets.description: Synthetic kubectl command samples.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: MuSR Synthetic

datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: PuzzleQA
datasets.description: A dataset of 558 NPR Sunday Puzzle games from 2007-2021.

datasets.name: ACPBench- open ended questions
datasets.description:
Data for training and evaluation of LLMs on reasonings tasks about action, change, and planning.
The dataset consists of open-ended questions that test reasoning abilities.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: ACPBench- boolean and multiple choice
datasets.description:
Data for training and evaluation of LLMs on reasonings tasks about action, change, and planning.
The dataset consists of boolean and multiple choice questions that test reasoning abilities.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: MagPie Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic single turn instruction dataset created by following MagPie using two teacher language models.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: NuminaMath-CoT Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from NuminaMath-CoT dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/AI-MO/NuminaMath-CoT).  Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: data_ablation_full59k Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from data_ablation_full59k dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/simplescaling/data_ablation_full59K).  Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenMathReasoning Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from OpenMathReasoning dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/OpenMathReasoning)  Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenThoughts2-1M
datasets.description: Open synthetic reasoning dataset with 1M high-quality examples covering math, science, code, and puzzles.

datasets.description: Problems from DeepScaleR-Preview dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepScaleR-Preview-Dataset). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.

datasets.description: Problems from HARDMath dataset (https://github.com/sarahmart/HARDMath). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.

datasets.name: Ncert Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems Ncert dataset (https://huggingface.co/collections/KadamParth/ncert-dataset). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Codeforces Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting  of ~10K competitive coding problems from Codeforces websites (https://huggingface.co/datasets/open-r1/codeforces) all the way to 2025 with solutions generated using Phi-4 reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenCodeReasoning Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 28,319 unique competitive programming questions sourced from APPS, TACO,CodeContests,Codeforces (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/OpenCodeReasoning) with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: DeepCoder-PrimeIntellect Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 16K verified coding problems from PrimeIntellect’s SYNTHETIC-1 (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepCoder-Preview-Dataset/viewer/primeintellect) coding challenges with verifiable unit tests with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: DeepCoder-TACO Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 7.5K TACO (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepCoder-Preview-Dataset/viewer/taco) verified problems, a large scale collection of competitive coding problems with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenCodeInstruct Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 5M synthetically generated coding problems starting from seed problems from 10 datasets and  Python functions from GitHub. (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/OpenCodeInstruct). Solutions generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Open Code Instruct
datasets.description: The largest open-access instruction tuning dataset (in python), comprising 5 million diverse samples.

datasets.name: Llama Nemotron post training Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 9M sythetically generated coding problems sourced from Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset). Solutions  generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Glaive-code-assistant
datasets.description: A synthetic dataset of real conversational examples formatted for function calling, where AI assistant interactions include explicit function call invocations for structured outputs.

datasets.name: IBM Seq SGD Dataset
datasets.description: A multi-turn, multi-domain task-oriented dialogue dataset with annotated schemas and turn-level labels for learning structured interactions with services and APIs. The data is filtered using an FC-Reflector–based approach to retain high-quality tool-calling and dialogue transitions.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Multi-turn slot filling with system instruction
datasets.description: A dataset created from the Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) data, focused on slot-filling tasks where models must extract and populate correct slot values from multi-turn dialogue context. It emphasizes accurate slot prediction across turns and services, supporting structured information extraction for task-oriented dialogue systems.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Slot instruction
datasets.description: A multi-turn tool-calling dataset focused on generating correct tool parameters from dialogue context. It provides slot-level instructions (type, description, and formatting rules like YYYY-MM-DD) to guide accurate argument filling and validation.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: When2Call
datasets.description: A dataset designed to teach and evaluate models on when to call a tool vs. when to answer directly or ask a follow-up question, improving decision-making for tool invocation. It includes multiple-choice and training splits to help models learn the correct tool-calling behavior.

datasets.name: Routing dataset for function calling
datasets.description: A routing dataset designed to train models to select the correct tool (or no tool) based on user intent from a set of possible tools. Each tool represents a distinct intent category, emphasizing accurate intent recognition, ambiguity handling, and correct route selection without argument generation.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: xlam-irrelevance-7.5k
datasets.description: A dataset of 7,500 examples created by removing the correct functions from tool lists so the model must recognize when available functions are irrelevant to the user’s request, helping improve irrelevance detection in tool-calling models.

datasets.name: xlam_function_calling_60k - filtered
datasets.description: We use xlam-function-calling-60k (https://huggingface.co/datasets/Salesforce/xlam-function-calling-60k), a synthetic dataset of 60,000 examples focused on converting user instructions into correct tool calls with realistic API schemas and structured arguments. We used ToolRM (https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.11963) filter to get best 75% data.

datasets.name: Synthetic data for Instana tools
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated for Instana tools and filtered using FC-Reflector
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic data for Apptio
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated for Apptio tools and filtered using FC-Reflector
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic data - parallel and multiple tool-calling scenarios.
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated using an IBM-developed synthetic data generation pipeline, focused on parallel and multiple tool-calling scenarios. The data is filtered using IBM-developed synthetic filters and a ToolRM-based filter to ensure high quality.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Long-context-10K
datasets.description: 10k subset from the dataset collection, where the tool library is inflated with additional tools to increase the context size, which are also filtered with Mistral-7B-RM.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: XLAM-robustness
datasets.description: A dataset built on top of xLAM function-calling data to evaluate robustness in tool-calling models under query rephrasing and changes in available tools. The data is generated by rewriting user queries and creating new function-calling candidates using expanded toolkits while filtering equivalent tools to ensure valid and challenging tool-calling scenarios.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: XLAM-masked
datasets.description: Subset of the XLAM-robustness data where the Function names and the Arguments are masked.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic single turn RAG dataset
datasets.description: Single turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic single turn RAG dataset - Wikipedia and government domains
datasets.description: Single turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The domains include wikipedia and goverment domains. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic multi-turn RAG dataset - Wikipedia and government domains
datasets.description: Multi turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The number of turns range from 2-16. The domains include wikipedia and goverment domains. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Acquired multi-turn dataset; government domain
datasets.description: Multiturn conversation data created by the human annotators at Defined.ai, and reviewed for quality from human annotators. The data comes from government domains.
datasets.data_provenance: Private non-publicly available datasets obtained from third-parties

datasets.name: OpenCodeGeneticInstruct - mixtral 8x22b instruct subset
datasets.description: OpenCodeGeneticInstruct comprises more than 15M coding instructions in python which is generated synthetically with the Genetic-Instruct approach.  Only the Mixtral-8x22b-instruct subset of this dataset is used.

datasets.name: OpenMathInstruct-1
datasets.description: A math instruction tuning dataset with 1.8M problem-solution pairs generated using permissively licensed Mixtral-8x7B model.

datasets.name: Hermes 3
datasets.description: A diverse collection of instruction data, curated and generated to include a range of domains and use cases.

datasets.name: Hermes reasoning tool use

datasets.description: A structured output reasoning dataset. Output adheres to defined json schema.

datasets.description: A multilingual dataset with 6.3 trillion tokens in 167 languages, tailored for LLM development.

datasets.languages: bn, gu, hi, kn, ml, mr, or, pa, ta, te
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Hermes Function-Calling V1
datasets.description: A structured output dataset of multi-turn function-calling conversations designed to train models to interpret natural language and generate correct function invocations with JSON-style responses. It includes diverse scenarios where assistants must decide which functions to call and format their arguments properly, making it useful for improving real dialogue-level tool-calling behavior.

datasets.name: AceReason-Math
datasets.description: A high quality, verfiable, challenging and diverse math dataset for training math reasoning model using reinforcement learning.

datasets.name: CoT-Python Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic Python code reasoning SFT dataset with Chain of Thought reasoning, which is aimed to improve model's reasoning performance for Input-Ouput prediction task for Python code.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Temporal Reasoning Synthetic
datasets.description: A dataset of question-answer pairs designed to improve the temporal reasoning capabilities of large language models. The dataset specifically targets known weaknesses in understanding time-related concepts, such as historical era transitions (BC/AD), cyclical time calculations (day-of-week), and other complex temporal arithmetic problems such as duration and schedule. The data includes a step-by-step "chain of thought" reasoning for each problem, leading to a final answer.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic MagPie Logical Reasoning
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset of puzzles and solutions created by folllowing MagPie self generation technique
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Internal Safety Data
datasets.description: An IBM synthetic dataset created for safety alignment of Granite models in areas such as child safety, animal cruelty, self harm, weapons use, sexual violence, societal risk, discrimination, information hazards, and systems risk.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenCodeInstruct
datasets.description: The largest open-access instruction tuning dataset, comprising 5 million diverse samples. OpenCodeInstruct is designed for supervised fine-tuning (SFT).

datasets.name: Concert Workflow Data
datasets.description: Data generated by, processed through, or used within the IBM Concert Workflows platform
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Concert Actions Data
datasets.description: Structured information associated with actions generated, recommended, or executed within the IBM Concert platform.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OPA Data_Public
datasets.description: Structured JSON data that provides external context or facts used by Open Policy Agent (OPA) policies.

datasets.name: OPA Data_Docs
datasets.description: Core concepts in OPA's policy language (Rego).

datasets.name: Spider 1.0
datasets.description: Large-scale complex and cross-domain semantic parsing and text-to-SQL dataset.

datasets.name: Kubectl data
datasets.description: Kubectl data relevant to SRE Agent.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenMathReasoning
datasets.description: Large-scale math reasoning dataset for training large language models (LLMs)

datasets.name: NuminaMath-CoT
datasets.description: Approximately 860k math problems, where each solution is formatted in a Chain of Thought (CoT) manner.

datasets.name: data ablation_full59K
datasets.description: Approximately 59k high-quality mathematical problems and solutions designed for training reasoning-based AI models. Features detailed thinking trajectories and chain-of-thought (CoT) responses sourced from various competitive math benchmarks.

datasets.name: Llama-Nemotron Post Training
datasets.description: Compilation of SFT and RL data that supports improvements of math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following capabilities of the original Llama instruct model, in support of NVIDIA’s release of Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1, Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 and Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Nano-8B-v1.

datasets.name: NuminaMath-1.5
datasets.description: Second iteration of NuminaMath dataset, bringing high quality post-training data for approximately 900k competition-level math problems. Each solution is formatted in a Chain of Thought (CoT) manner.

datasets.name: II-Thought-RL-v0
datasets.description: Large-scale, multi-domain Reinforcement Learning (RL) dataset, with over 340k high-quality reasoning problems.

datasets.name: DeepScaleR Preview Dataset
datasets.description: Approximately 40,000 unique mathematics problem-answer pairs compiled from: AIME, AMC, Omni-MATH dataset, and Still dataset.

datasets.name: HARDMath
datasets.description: A dataset of challenging, graduate-level problems in applied mathematics that can be used for language model evaluation. Unlike other popular mathematical datasets, HARDMath contains problems that require a combination of advanced problem-solving skills, approximation methods, and mathematical intuition. The dataset contains a large test set of 1,050 problems and a mini test set of 437 problems, divided across seven different problem types.

datasets.name: Ncert Dataset
datasets.description: A collection of educational content derived from NCERT textbooks for students in standards 6 to 12. NCERT books are textbooks published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT), an Indian organization focused on improving school education.

datasets.name: open-thoughts/OpenThoughts3-1.2M
datasets.description: The third iteration the our line of OpenThoughts datasets, building on previous OpenThoughts-114k and OpenThoughts2-1M. The dataset consists of 850,000 math questions, 250,000 code questions, and 100,000 science questions.

datasets.name: open-r1/codeforces - questions only: HuggingFace Download
datasets.description: CodeForces is one of the most popular websites among competitive programmers, hosting regular contests where participants must solve challenging algorithmic optimization problems. The challenging nature of these problems makes them an interesting dataset to improve and test models’ code reasoning capabilities. This dataset includes more than 10k unique problems covering the very first contests all the way to 2025. Additionally, it includes generated and extensively validated custom checker code for problems with multiple solutions, and generated additional challenging test cases.

datasets.name: openCodeReasoning
datasets.description: Open Code Reasoning is the largest reasoning-based synthetic dataset to date for coding, comprising of 736,712 samples in Python across 28,904 unique competitive programming questions.

datasets.name: /OpenCoder-LLM/opc-sft-stage2/viewer/educational_instruct
datasets.description: Contains generated (instruction, code, test case) triples, validated through a Python compiler. Notably, the inclusion of test cases provides a valuable signal for code RL.

datasets.name: OpenCoder-LLM/opc-sft-stage2/viewer/package_instruct
datasets.description: Used extracted common interface documentation from pydoc as a seed to generate Python package-related questions.

datasets.name: Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset
datasets.description: A compilation of SFT and RL data that supports improvements of math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following capabilities of the original Llama instruct model, in support of NVIDIA’s release of Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1, Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 and Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Nano-8B-v1.

datasets.name: Multi-turn sequential slot filling and tool usage
datasets.description: A multi-step dataset derived from the Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) data that focuses on sequential slot filling and tool usage across multiple turns. It requires models to extract slots from user input, call the appropriate tools in order, and use tool responses to complete downstream actions correctly.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: GovReport-QS
datasets.description: Multi turn conversations extracted from the GovReport datasets, specifically forcusing on the conversations on long documents.

datasets.name: hotpot_qa
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations extracted from the hotpotQA, specifically forcusing on the conversations on long documents and requiring reasoning.

datasets.name: NarrativeQA
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations extracted from the NarrativeQA, specifically focusing on the conversations on long documents.

datasets.name: TechQA
datasets.description: Singe turn conversations sampled from the TechQA, specifically focusing on the conversations on techincal documents.

datasets.name: FinQA
datasets.description: FinQA is a large-scale dataset with 2.8k financial reports for 8k Q&A pairs to study numerical reasoning with structured and unstructured evidence.

datasets.name: DeepScaleR-1.5B-Preview Problems
datasets.description: Approximately 40,000 unique mathematics problem-answer pairs. Each row in the JSON dataset contains: (problem, solution, answer).

datasets.name: Live Code Bench
datasets.description: LiveCodeBench collects problem statements, ground-truth solutions, and test cases from coding competition websites across three competition platforms – LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces.

datasets.name: Skywork-OR1-RL-Data
datasets.description: A dataset of verifiable, challenging, and diverse math problems (105K) and coding questions (14K). This dataset is used to train the Skywork-OR1 (Open Reasoner 1) model series, which consists of powerful math and code reasoning models trained using large-scale rule-based reinforcement learning with carefully designed datasets and training recipes. We use the prompts only.

datasets.name: AIME_1983_2024
datasets.description: Dataset consists of the Benchmark of AIME from year 1983~2023, and 2024(part 2).

datasets.name: PrimeIntellect/INTELLECT-2-RL
datasets.description: Mathematics and coding tasks that can be verified through symbolic verification / string matching and unit test execution.

datasets.name: Tool-N1-R1
datasets.description: Data for training Nemotron-Research-Tool-N1

datasets.name: ORPO-DPO-mix-40k
datasets.description: A combination of high-quality DPO datasets.

datasets.name: IF_multi_constraints_upto5
datasets.description: This is the IF-RLVR training data, with up to 5 constraints per instruction. The constraints are sampled from IFEval (25) and IFBench-Train (29).

datasets.name: IFEval
datasets.description: Prompts used in the Instruction-Following Eval (IFEval) benchmark for large language models. It contains around 500 "verifiable instructions" such as "write in more than 400 words" and "mention the keyword of AI at least 3 times" which can be verified by heuristics.

datasets.name: Indic Vault
datasets.description: Instruction-tuned dataset that contains question-answer pairs in contemporary, everyday Indian languages

datasets.name: leetcode-solutions-en-2k
datasets.description: Dataset contains English descriptions and solutions for approximately 2,000 LeetCode problems.

datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Big-Math-RL-Verified Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from Big-Math-RL-Verified dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/SynthLabsAI/Big-Math-RL-Verified). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Big Math RL Verified
datasets.description: A dataset of over 250,000 high-quality math questions with verifiable answers, purposefully made for reinforcement learning (RL).

datasets.name: DeepScaleR-Preview Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from DeepScaleR-Preview dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepScaleR-Preview-Dataset). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: HARDMath Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems from HARDMath dataset (https://github.com/sarahmart/HARDMath). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Ncert Synthetic
datasets.description: Problems Ncert dataset (https://huggingface.co/collections/KadamParth/ncert-dataset). Responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning and Mistral-Small-24B-Instruct-2501 as a judge to identify correct chain of thought.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Codeforces Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting  of ~10K competitive coding problems from Codeforces websites (https://huggingface.co/datasets/open-r1/codeforces) all the way to 2025 with solutions generated using Phi-4 reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenCodeReasoning Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 28,319 unique competitive programming questions sourced from APPS, TACO,CodeContests,Codeforces (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/OpenCodeReasoning) with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: DeepCoder-PrimeIntellect Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 16K verified coding problems from PrimeIntellect’s SYNTHETIC-1 (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepCoder-Preview-Dataset/viewer/primeintellect) coding challenges with verifiable unit tests with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: DeepCoder-TACO Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 7.5K TACO (https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentica-org/DeepCoder-Preview-Dataset/viewer/taco) verified problems, a large scale collection of competitive coding problems with responses generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: OpenCodeInstruct Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 5M synthetically generated coding problems starting from seed problems from 10 datasets and  Python functions from GitHub. (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/OpenCodeInstruct). Solutions generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Open Code Instruct
datasets.description: The largest open-access instruction tuning dataset (in python), comprising 5 million diverse samples.

datasets.name: Llama Nemotron post training Synthetic
datasets.description: Synthetic dataset consisting of 9M sythetically generated coding problems sourced from Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/nvidia/Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset). Solutions  generated using Phi-4-reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Glaive-code-assistant
datasets.description: A synthetic dataset of real conversational examples formatted for function calling, where AI assistant interactions include explicit function call invocations for structured outputs.

datasets.name: IBM Seq SGD Dataset
datasets.description: A multi-turn, multi-domain task-oriented dialogue dataset with annotated schemas and turn-level labels for learning structured interactions with services and APIs. The data is filtered using an FC-Reflector–based approach to retain high-quality tool-calling and dialogue transitions.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Multi-turn slot filling with system instruction
datasets.description: A dataset created from the Schema-Guided Dialogue (SGD) data, focused on slot-filling tasks where models must extract and populate correct slot values from multi-turn dialogue context. It emphasizes accurate slot prediction across turns and services, supporting structured information extraction for task-oriented dialogue systems.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Slot instruction
datasets.description: A multi-turn tool-calling dataset focused on generating correct tool parameters from dialogue context. It provides slot-level instructions (type, description, and formatting rules like YYYY-MM-DD) to guide accurate argument filling and validation.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: When2Call
datasets.description: A dataset designed to teach and evaluate models on when to call a tool vs. when to answer directly or ask a follow-up question, improving decision-making for tool invocation. It includes multiple-choice and training splits to help models learn the correct tool-calling behavior.

datasets.name: Routing dataset for function calling
datasets.description: A routing dataset designed to train models to select the correct tool (or no tool) based on user intent from a set of possible tools. Each tool represents a distinct intent category, emphasizing accurate intent recognition, ambiguity handling, and correct route selection without argument generation.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: xlam-irrelevance-7.5k
datasets.description: A dataset of 7,500 examples created by removing the correct functions from tool lists so the model must recognize when available functions are irrelevant to the user’s request, helping improve irrelevance detection in tool-calling models.

datasets.name: xlam_function_calling_60k - filtered
datasets.description: We use xlam-function-calling-60k (https://huggingface.co/datasets/Salesforce/xlam-function-calling-60k), a synthetic dataset of 60,000 examples focused on converting user instructions into correct tool calls with realistic API schemas and structured arguments. We used ToolRM (https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.11963) filter to get best 75% data.

datasets.name: Synthetic data for Instana tools
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated for Instana tools and filtered using FC-Reflector
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic data for Apptio
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated for Apptio tools and filtered using FC-Reflector
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic data - parallel and multiple tool-calling scenarios.
datasets.description: Synthetic data generated using an IBM-developed synthetic data generation pipeline, focused on parallel and multiple tool-calling scenarios. The data is filtered using IBM-developed synthetic filters and a ToolRM-based filter to ensure high quality.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Long-context-10K
datasets.description: 10k subset from the dataset collection, where the tool library is inflated with additional tools to increase the context size, which are also filtered with Mistral-7B-RM.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: XLAM-robustness
datasets.description: A dataset built on top of xLAM function-calling data to evaluate robustness in tool-calling models under query rephrasing and changes in available tools. The data is generated by rewriting user queries and creating new function-calling candidates using expanded toolkits while filtering equivalent tools to ensure valid and challenging tool-calling scenarios.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: XLAM-masked
datasets.description: Subset of the XLAM-robustness data where the Function names and the Arguments are masked.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic single turn RAG dataset
datasets.description: Single turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic single turn RAG dataset - Wikipedia and government domains
datasets.description: Single turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The domains include wikipedia and goverment domains. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Synthetic multi-turn RAG dataset - Wikipedia and government domains
datasets.description: Multi turn synthetically generated RAG dataset. The number of turns range from 2-16. The domains include wikipedia and goverment domains. The dataset is filtered using the using MagPie filters on input quality, sample quality and difficulty.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Acquired multi-turn dataset; government domain
datasets.description: Multiturn conversation data created by the human annotators at Defined.ai, and reviewed for quality from human annotators. The data comes from government domains.
datasets.data_provenance: Private non-publicly available datasets obtained from third-parties

datasets.name: sql-instruct-rewards-RLVR
datasets.description: Dataset is created based by using code to modify sql datasets to perform Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) in the SQL domain.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: SYNTHETIC-1
datasets.description: Reasoning traces for a diverse range of tasks across math, coding and science, whose correctness was confirmed with task-specific verifiers.  Dataset was generated with crowdsourced compute and annotated with diverse verifiers such as LLM judges or symbolic mathematics verifiers.

datasets.name: xlam_function_calling_60k
datasets.description: A synthetic dataset of 60,000 examples focused on converting user instructions into correct tool calls with realistic API schemas and structured arguments.

datasets.name: AutoIF-instruct-61k
datasets.description: A dataset of 61,000 instruction-following examples automatically generated using the AutoIF framework.

datasets.name: HelpSteer3
datasets.description: HelpSteer3 contains 40,476 preference samples, each containing a domain, language, context, two responses, an overall preference score between the responses as well as individual preferences from up to 3 annotators. Each individual preference contains a preference score in addition to a concise reasoning for their preference in 1-2 sentences.

datasets.name: OpenCodeGeneticInstruct - mixtral 8x22b instruct subset
datasets.description: OpenCodeGeneticInstruct comprises more than 15M coding instructions in python which is generated synthetically with the Genetic-Instruct approach.  Only the Mixtral-8x22b-instruct subset of this dataset is used.

datasets.name: OpenMathInstruct-1
datasets.description: A math instruction tuning dataset with 1.8M problem-solution pairs generated using permissively licensed Mixtral-8x7B model.

datasets.name: Hermes 3
datasets.description: A diverse collection of instruction data, curated and generated to include a range of domains and use cases.

datasets.name: Hermes reasoning tool use
datasets.description: A 50,000-row dataset compilation focused on tool-use reasoning.

datasets.name: json-mode-reasoning
datasets.description: A structured output reasoning dataset. Output adheres to defined json schema.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Code CoT Synthetic
datasets.description: An IBM synthetic dataset generated with the objective of improving model reasoning.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible

datasets.name: Enhanced FIM dataset
datasets.description: Synthetic FIM dataset.
datasets.data_provenance: Synthetic data that is not publicly accessible
